description: Named supplier-customer graph (curated AI/semis/power/Apple/EV hubs) + live perf/boom colouring + supplier-laggard alpha (suppliers of booming hubs that haven't moved). Powers supply-chain.html SPLC-style visual. top_picks -> signal-harvester (eng:supply-chain-graph) measure-before-trust. Supersedes empty supply-chain-linkage (FMP supply-chain dead).
